scripts.clear: rm -rf node_modules main/node_modules tests/node_modules && npm cache verify
scripts.deploy: npm version --preid build prerelease --message 'New build: %s [skip ci]'
scripts.install: npm install --prefix main && npm install --prefix tests
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix main && npm run lint --prefix tests
scripts.version: npm version $(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --no-git-tag-version --prefix main && npm version $(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --no-git-tag-version --prefix tests && git add main/package.json main/package-lock.json tests/package.json tests/package-lock.json
scripts.test: npm run compile --prefix main && npm test --prefix tests
